Name: Cybercrime & Unauthorized Intrusion
Definition: hacking, malware, unauthorized access, password cracking, cyberattacks.

Name: Chemical & Biological Weapons/Drugs
Definition: bombs, chemical or biological harm, weapon-related instructions, illegal drugs.

Name: Copyright Violations
Definition: requests involving unlawful copying or distribution of copyrighted material.

Name: Misinformation & Disinformation
Definition: propaganda, harmful lies, fake news, election interference, defamation.

Name: Harassment & Bullying
Definition: harassment, hate speech, abusive targeting, encouragement of self-harm.

Name: Illegal Activities
Definition: fraud, scams, theft, vandalism, extortion, sexual exploitation, violent crime, assisting suicide, illegal weapons acquisition.

Name: General Harm
Definition: unsafe practices, privacy/data exploitation, graphic or age-restricted harmful content.
